Accueil/Arcade/Red Square Adventure

Red Square Adventure

Arcade4.740k parties jouées
Plein écran

Welcome to the adventurous life of a cute red square. The red square has to pass the levels one by one and it needs you. Pass the obstacles and get the red square to the end of the level! How to Play? WASD + Mobile Touch Control *Double jump available
